description.ko: 대지 표면에 대한 추상적 탐구로, 갈라진 토양, 광물 맥, 퇴적층의 복잡한 패턴을 강조합니다.
description.en: An abstract exploration of the Earth's surface, highlighting the intricate patterns of cracked soil, mineral veins, and sedimentary layers.

prompt: A high-resolution macro photograph of diverse earth textures, featuring cracked desert clay, smooth river stones, and rich dark loam, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, earthy tones, organic patterns.
